ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the shipping option is applicable (e.g., Switzerland, Europe) */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option (e.g., Priority, Economy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping option (e.g., '1-2 days') */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the shipping option includes insurance */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the shipping cost is denominated (e.g., 'CHF', 'EUR', 'USD') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping cost */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option for which the cost is applicable */,
  "order_value_min" REAL /* Minimum order value for which the cost is applicable */,
  "order_value_max" REAL /* Maximum order value for which the cost is applicable */,
  "cost" REAL /* Shipping cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the cost is denominated (e.g., 'CHF', 'EUR', 'USD') */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the shipping cost applies to international shipments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_costs_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_value" REAL /* Total value of the order */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option chosen for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Actual shipping cost for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order (e.g., 'Credit Card', 'PayPal') */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., 'Processing', 'Shipped', 'Delivered') */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer for contact purposes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer for regional analysis */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer for regional analysis */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer for regional analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
